summary: Educational app ('Memory Increase') with games in Section A and Section B (including Missing Letter game). Features difficulty levels and 'Show Answer' button. Sound effects being added across all games.
architectural_notes: App is a PWA (Progressive Web App) deployed on ICP at https://7qf4a-ziaaa-aaaap-qncea-cai.icp0.io
App has two sections: Section A and Section B, with games including Missing Letter game

existing_features.title: Create a custom useSoundEffects hook that generates and plays three short sound effects using the Web Audio API (no external files needed): a soft click/tap sound on every interactive button press, a cheerful success chime on correct answers, and a low buzz/error sound on wrong answers. The hook should expose play functions: playClick(), playSuccess(), playError().

Integrate sound effects into all Section A game pages: CardMatchingGame, MemoryTestGame, PatternMemoryGame, SequenceMemoryGame, SlidingPuzzleGame, StroopEffectGame, and SpeedTypingGame. Call playClick() on every button/tile interaction, playSuccess() on correct answers or level completion, and playError() on wrong answers or game-over states.

Integrate sound effects into all Section B game pages: MissingLetterGame, WordScrambleGame, and FillInTheBlanksGame. Call playClick() on every button press or input submission, playSuccess() on correct answers, and playError() on wrong answers.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add short sound effects to all games: click sound on every tap, success sound on correct answer, error sound on wrong answer
